resources.string: Today — logged kcal, hydration, and tracking streak
No target set — complete your profile
Photo(s) ready — tap the button to analyze
Scan\'eat uses the camera to read barcodes and photograph food labels.
%1$s recognized from the public medication database (ANSM). Add it to your Treatment list?
%1$s (%2$s) — this product is not intended for consumption.
Do not ingest. In case of ingestion or exposure, contact emergency services immediately (112 in Europe, 911 in the US) or a poison control center.
This device has no camera. Enter the barcode manually instead.
Another app may be using the camera. Try again or enter the barcode manually.
Invalid barcode — check the digits you entered
Product not found in the database — photograph the label to continue
Goal: %1$d mL/day (2.5 L male / 2 L female + 0.5 L if active — EFSA)
Based on your profile, a goal of %1$d mL may suit you better.
No saved recipes or templates yet. Create one from Recipes or Templates.
Not enough data yet for a chart
Trend chart: from %1$s to %2$s across %3$d points
Estimated from your weight history and current measurements (waist/hip/neck) — not a real day-to-day measurement
Estimated at zero fasting/ketosis (baseline), independent of your actual state today. The trends below track only the effect of your changing body composition.
Add waist circumference in Profile to unlock WHtR
Estimates based on age, sex, body composition and metabolic context. Not a substitute for a blood test.
Every value shown in Metabolism derives from a published formula. Below: the formula, your current numbers substituted, and the source.
Macro floors — Phillips & Van Loon (2011) / Cahill (2006)
EFSA 2017 · adequate intake for transit & microbiome
WHO 2012 · AHA target 1500 mg · NHANES limit 2300 mg
Let\'s set up your profile in 3 quick steps. This data stays on your device and feeds every calculation.
Sex and age calibrate your BMR formula. Height and weight are the main inputs.
Unlocks Navy BF%%, waist/hip ratio, and visceral fat indicators.
How active are you day to day? This multiplies your BMR to estimate total expenditure.
Warning: prolonged fast — fat reserves are depleting, protein catabolism is rising again.
Log a meal or adjust the time below
Disabled — enable to adjust hormone/ketosis estimates below. Separate from Journal\'s timer.
Indicators: BMI · body fat · waist/height ratio · respiratory quotient
Age, sex, height, and weight are needed to calculate your BMR and substrate flux.
No favorites yet — tap the star on a scan to add it.
Create recipes to automatically generate your grocery list.
Every checked item will be reset. This action can\'t be undone.
No recipes planned this week yet. Add recipes to your meal plan or turn this filter off.
Select the allergens to watch for
Select the conditions to factor into calculations
Adjusts fat-mass calculation per Deurenberg et al. 1998 and WHO 2004 thresholds.
Optional — provides Navy BF%%, WHtR, WHR (Hodgdon & Beckett 1984 method).
Day 1 = first day of period. Used to model E2 and progesterone by phase.
Early luteal · E2 100–200 pg/mL, progesterone rising
Late luteal · E2 and progesterone falling
No custom foods yet.\nTap + to create one.
Meal templates are created automatically when you log a meal from the diary.
No items yet. Add one below.
Trend chart: from %1$s to %2$s over the last %3$d weigh-ins
No weigh-ins logged yet. Add your first weight to start tracking progress.
Nothing logged yet. Scan a product and tap \'Log it\'.
No entries for this meal slot.
"%1$s" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
Scan a barcode or photograph a label to get a 0–100 nutrition score based on the product\'s actual composition.
The score isn\'t a black box
Every score comes with a formula you can inspect — sources and method included, not just a number.
Beyond scanning, track your BMR, ketosis, and fasting in real time — a dedicated tab, built in.
Scan\'eat uses an AI vision model to read labels. Choose how to call it:
Your own Groq key (free). Data processed by Groq.
Your own Ktor backend. No data leaves your infrastructure.
Skip, scan without AI for now
A few quick details power a personal score and targets. Diet, allergens, and other details can be set later from the Profile tab.
This fast in progress will be discarded without being saved to your history. This action cannot be undone.
Calls Groq directly with your key.
Calls your Ktor backend at the URL below.
Optional backup provider — used automatically if Groq is unavailable. The model is picked automatically, no need to select one.
Used in Weight, Profile, and Biolism
Decorative background pattern, separate from the light/dark theme above
Wider letter and line spacing for easier reading
Sex, age, height, weight, diet, allergens — required for the personal score.
Meals, hydration, weigh-ins, activity, fasting, and custom reminders.
This app does not provide medical advice. Scores, estimates and recommendations are informational and don\'t replace guidance from a healthcare professional.
Nutrition information comes from open databases or label recognition and may contain errors or be incomplete.
Nutrition targets are computed from published formulas (Mifflin-St Jeor, EFSA, WHO) applied to your own data; they are estimates, not prescriptions.
Medication tracking is a plain manual reminder. It does not check drug interactions, dosage, or contraindications — always consult a healthcare professional or pharmacist.
The publisher accepts no liability for health decisions made solely on information from this app.
Your data (profile, history, medications) is stored locally on your device and only sent to third-party services if you explicitly enable a feature that requires it (e.g. API-based scoring).
Export your data (scans, diary, weight, custom foods, recipes…) to a file you can restore later, on this device or another.
This file comes from a newer app version and can\'t be imported.
Error reading or writing the file.
Backup from %1$s (app v%2$s), %3$d items. This will overwrite your current data.
Selectively clear some of the app\'s data.
Choose what you want to clear:
To clear all data, use System Settings → App → Clear Data.
This action is irreversible and will delete your entire scan history. Confirm?
This action is irreversible and will delete your entire fasting history. Confirm?
Sync your weight with Health Connect to share it with other health apps.
Health Connect app not installed on this device.
Health Connect isn\'t available on this device.
This week: average deficit of %1$d kcal/day, and weight is trending down (%2$+.1f kg/week) — consistent.
This week: average surplus of %1$d kcal/day, and weight is trending up (%2$+.1f kg/week) — consistent.
This week: average deficit of %1$d kcal/day, but weight isn\'t trending down (%2$+.1f kg/week) — worth a look.
This week: average surplus of %1$d kcal/day, but weight isn\'t trending up (%2$+.1f kg/week) — worth a look.
Fasting: %1$d%% of fasts hit target this week
Hydration: goal met %1$d%% of this week
Nutrition computed from the CIQUAL (ANSES) food composition tables; plate split follows Manger Bouger / PNNS guidelines (½ vegetables, ¼ starches, ¼ protein).
Give it one ingredient, and the AI proposes a few ideas.
No ideas found for that ingredient.
List what you have on hand (comma or one item per line), and the AI proposes a few ideas.
No dishes detected in this photo.
Paste a recipe link (blog, cooking site…)
Indicative nutrition (source): %1$d kcal, %2$dg protein, %3$dg carbs, %4$dg fat
No recipes yet. Create your first multi-ingredient recipe.
This scan no longer exists or was deleted.
No particular information for this product.
The ingredients list could not be read from the label — your allergens and diet could not be verified for this product
Complete your profile (health, diet, allergies) to unlock a personal score
Veto: incompatible with your profile regardless of score
Summary of today\'s scans, hydration, and meals
Don\'t forget to log your breakfast.
Don\'t forget to log your snack.
Don\'t forget to log your lunch.
Don\'t forget to log your dinner.
Remember to drink a glass of water.
It\'s been a while — log your weight.
You\'ve reached your fasting goal — well done!
It\'s been a while since your last workout — get moving!
Several %1$s active at the same time — bleeding risk
SSRI/SNRI + MAOI — risk of serotonin syndrome
WHO goal: 150 min/week of moderate activity
